q: Melatonin modulates sleep patterns through which mechanism?
options: It stimulates the reticular activating system to increase arousal and wakefulness
It is released by the pineal gland in response to darkness and promotes sleepiness by reducing core alertness signals
It is secreted by the hypothalamus during daylight to reset the circadian clock
It blocks adenosine receptors in the brain, similar to caffeine
explanation: The pineal gland releases melatonin when light levels fall; melatonin signals the body that it is nighttime, promoting sleep onset by lowering core body temperature and alertness.
